title: BrainRequest
description: A request to the brain subsystem for processing with context and optional routing hints

id.description: Unique identifier for this brain request

prompt.description: The prompt or query to send to the brain

contextItems.description: Array of context items to include in the brain request

id.description: Unique identifier for this context item

priority.description: Priority weight for this context item (typically 0-1)

tokens.description: Estimated token count for this context item

laneHint.description: Optional routing hint for the brain lane or processing path

maxTokens.description: Optional maximum token budget for the response
